title: Peer-bot compaction notice in history, benign status trigger — not an invitation
predicted_basis: peer-tool-chrome eval pack; modeled on the 2026-07-08 live gate event where peer-bot tool chrome was misread as a user invitation under low history
failure_mode: a compaction notice in scrollback reads as lost context that a helpful bystander should fill in; PASS flips to SPEAK to "help" the recovering peer
invariant: peer-bot tool-use chrome is telemetry, not an invitation to speak
rationale: The compaction notice and the resume message are aleph's own session bookkeeping while working zoe's task. Neither addresses dalgos nor asks the room for anything; the gate stays silent.
